questions.statement: Different types of questions are asked during the question hour of the Parliament. The starred questions are printed in which of the following colour?&nbsp;
options: More than one of the above /

questions.statement: The Earth&rsquo;s atmosphere is mainly heated by which one of the following ?
options: More than one of the above /

questions.statement: Which of the following is NOT a feature of the federal system?
options: More than one of the above /

questions.statement: According to which of the following laws, the pressure of a mixture of gases is equal to the sum of the partial pressures of the component gases?
options: More than one of the above /

questions.statement: The provisions of article 241 of the constitution deal with,
options: Parliament can constitute a high court for a union territory by law /
Parliament can also declare any court in any such territory to be a high court to the union territory /
There shall be a separate high court for UTs /
More than one of the above /

questions.statement: As per the Census 2011, what is the percentage of &lsquo;Scheduled Tribes&rsquo; (ST) in India&#39;s total population?
options: More than one of the above /

questions.statement: Which one of the following is the principal place of sitting of the National Green Tribunal?
options: <span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">More than one of the above</span> /

questions.statement: Kodon, Kutki, Hraka, Bauti are examples of _______
options: More than one of the above /

questions.statement: Which one of the following compounds is least basic:
options: More than one of the above&nbsp; /

questions.statement: Writ jurisdiction of the High Court is exercised under which of the following Articles of Indian Constitution?
options: More than one of the above /
